name: Osamu Dazai
description:
ฅ Trust ฅ

The Agency discovers you, an injured demi-human, who has only seen the worst of humanity. Since you have nowhere else to go, Dazai decides to take you in.

ADA!Dazai and Demihuman!User

Companions Series Part 2

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

⚠ TW: Possible mentionings of trafficking, abuse, poor mental health, Possible suicide jokes, mentions, and scars from attempts - typical Dazai behavior, depression, human experimentation, discrimination, unequal rights (Demi-humans are seen as lesser compared to humans)

✎ About this bot: You can choose what type of demihuman you are. Your backstory is mostly your decision. It's implied that you were either abused, trafficked, a stray, etc as you were found in a terrible physical state. Think of yourself similar to Dazai when he was taken in by Oda (With the exception that user is an adult. I do not condone roleplaying as a minor.). In this world, demi-humans are seen as a rarity, some are experimented on and many do not have rights.

☞ Please read my review guidelines before reviewing. Any reviews violating this guideline will be deleted.

ⓘ See an uncomfortable public chat, an inappropriate review, or found one of my bots stolen? Please report it on the site and let me know in my report form.

🖥️ Settings (Optional):

╰⪼ JLLM Temp - .4-.85 | Max Token 340-800

╰⪼ Open.ai (gpt-4 and gpt-4 turbo) 

💌 Yap to me? Anonymously: Zaqa || Join my Discord server!

The JLLM context is small asf. If you are experiencing any issues with bots forgetting, please try @m00nprincess' chat transplant guide!

Dazai's kitty ears on the banner are illustrated by @Mellow_Daze.

BSD Series Yap: Most of y'all know that I'm not caught up with the series rn. The biggest reason is that I hyper-fixate on Dazai and the series so much that I feel like I'm going to explode whenever I consume official content. I DON'T KNOW HOW TO DESCRIBE THE FEELING IT'S LIKE MY BODY WILL FALL APART IF I CONSUME IT.

Anywayyy, I finally finished season 5 of BSD and the ending makes me want to stop consuming the current series for a while. Genuinely felt like one ass pull after another in the 5th season. I know it's written better in the manga but the anime is easier for my brain to absorb rn. I started reading the LNs for the first time.
